.tag:preset
# Preset Suggestions
[Range - Melee Preset Example](https://pvme.io/preset-maker/#/8f51aead-4c8c-46f9-b9eb-4d9dac459091)

.tag:rotation
# Rotations
### Wars
s<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642>  <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>
### Phase 1
r<:deadshot:1478061860371828929> + <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:fularrow:971025696958853180> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:blackstonearrow:785031580149743617> <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> switch to <:fularrow:971025696958853180> on 3 sec left → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938>  → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657>
.
*Note: If extremely fast phasing replace <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  with <:grico:787904334812807238> and <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> and get ready for gorilla*
.
## Phase 2 and 3
Base avoid targetting before dps do then do whatever
Gorilla: <:overpower:535532879334080517>  → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:punish:535532879439069184>
West <:divert:787904334377648130>  → <:barge:535532853916860437>
Warden → <:assault:535532855191928842>  → <:cane:535532878969438210>
middle chain <:overpower:535532879334080517>
Chain 2 → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>
East Warden: <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:rend:1478166426190741584>
Side: <:dive:1049378668197195808>  +  <:overpower:535532879334080517>
Mid: walk and <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>
Crocodile: <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642>  <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>
If running do on Amascut but don't use <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>
*Note: Replace warden with <:powerburstofvitality:654618235097972737> + <:surge:535533810004262912> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> as it deals less damage but is minimum 47k on a low roll and is faster*
.
**Amascut**
<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120>  → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:fularrow:971025696958853180>  → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>  → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  → <:rapid:535541270521708566>  → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416>  → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>  → <:snipe:1478061857486143498>  → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  → <:rapid:535541270521708566>  → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>  → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938>  → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>  → <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:berserk:535532854004678657>  → <:barge:535532853916860437>  → <:gflurry:535532879283879977>  → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640>  → <:overpower:535532879334080517>

Scarabs mostly skipped: <:bindingshot:535541306563231790>
Scarabs not skipped: build to <:cade:535541306353778689>
.
## Phase 4
If Scarab skipped and <:berserk:535532854004678657>  is still up → <:barge:535532853916860437>  scarab → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> / <:assault:535532855191928842>  gorilla depending on timing → <:overpower:535532879334080517>  → <:freedom:535541258240786434> → <:barge:535532853916860437> warden → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> / <:assault:535532855191928842>  → <:cane:535532878969438210>

If <:berserk:535532854004678657> runs out at any point switch to

<:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> scarab → throw on Gorilla + <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → go inside and throw
If out <:bombard:535541306391265284> a cluster and throw in

In Role → Warden <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>  → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>  → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>
Out Role → Warden <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>
Side Chain → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566>
Middle Chain → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
.
**Amascut**
<:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938>  → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>  → <:divert:787904334377648130>  → <:berserk:535532854004678657>  → <:barge:535532853916860437>  → <:overpower:535532879334080517> <:consecratedkeris:1334318846202478615> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977>  → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640>  → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:cane:535532878969438210>  → <:gfury:535532879334080527>  → <:overpower:535532879334080517>  → <:assault:535532855191928842>  → <:rend:1478166426190741584>  →  <:punish:535532879439069184>
Here you can cut the assaults short for <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> depends on expected phase timing of your team, end on over half adren
.
## Phase 5
Around the time both solo charges are done and both middle fragments are at 50%, prepare with: <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657>
As Tumeken's reform start, move next to tumeken and wait till jumping starts as she speaks 'GET OUT OF MY WAY' maintain Amascut as a target and → <:cane:535532878969438210>  spam till dogs are dead triple should be enough → <:overpower:535532879334080517>  → if jump skip <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640>  → <:ezk:903244090953588787> → <:assault:535532855191928842>  → improvise

[Hurricane Example](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=--TLIdvbAmo)
.
## Phase 6
As first pad dies on core <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120>  → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:fularrow:971025696958853180>  → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → 'Fall to the shadows' <:snipe:1478061857486143498> + <:powerburstofvitality:654618235097972737> + <:deflectmage:544195487926845462> → <:soulsplit:615613924506599497> after minions move + <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> depending on adren → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  → <:rapid:535541270521708566>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
.
Jump → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938>  → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642>  <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>  → <:berserk:535532854004678657>  → <:gfury:535532879334080527>  → <:cane:535532878969438210>  → <:pulverise:535532879053062146>  → <:overpower:535532879334080517>  → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640>  → <:assault:535532855191928842> → click light →
<:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120>  → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → stall <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → release + <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>  → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>  → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>  → <:grico:787904334812807238>  → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>  → <:rapid:535541270521708566>  → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>.
.
## Phase 7
<:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:punish:535532879439069184> → <:assault:535532855191928842> (3t) → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> (not scarabus) ( + <:voke:535541259465392143> if needed) <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028>
.
.tag:example
## Example Kills
- [1k 7:00-7:10 West Out 2KC](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KkHKqDrSR0U)
- [1k 6:42 East in East solo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2stIrV5M32A)
- [Jumper rot example](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JlNQK5CjYho)
